identity.context: {total_agents} agents completed parallel work on separate branches, now merged into test branch

tasks.task: Pull the test branch and run the full build
Run all tests — fix failures caused by merge integration
Check for import conflicts between agents
Check for interface mismatches (wrong signatures across scopes)
Debug and patch any runtime errors

constraints.constraint: Do not rewrite what agents did — only fix integration issues
Make minimal changes when fixing cross-scope problems
Commit each fix separately with a clear message
No emojis in code, comments, or commits

on_success.step: PR description: list all agent contributions and integration fixes

on_failure.step: Document what is broken and why in REVIEW.md at repo root
Do not force a broken merge
The orchestrator will handle retry logic
